last_item: Band D (first view): Login → shadcn. Rebuilt src/views/Login.tsx on shadcn Card (Header = brand square + CardTitle + CardDescription; Content = form; Footer = reset-password help) inside a centered <form> (grid min-h-screen place-items-center bg-background). Form body: FieldGroup + Field + FieldLabel + Input (was <label.field> + raw <input>); submit is a Button (w-full, was .btn .btn-primary .btn-block) composing shadcn Spinner + 'Signing in…' while busy; error is the shared Callout (Alert), tone warn on lockout / danger otherwise. Behavior identical: same login() call, same `from` redirect, same error copy, password cleared on failure, input disabled while busy/locked, submit disabled until password typed. A11y: Callout id='login-error', Input aria-invalid + aria-describedby pointing at it, data-invalid on Field. To allow id passthrough, shared Callout in ui.tsx now forwards ...props (ComponentProps<typeof Alert>) — safe, 40+ callsites unaffected. Deleted dead CSS: .login-screen/.login-card/.login-brand/.login-sub/.login-help, .brand-mark, .btn-block (all Login-only; .btn/.btn-primary kept for unmigrated views). Added Login.test.tsx (first test for this view): submit-gating, happy-path login+redirect, wrong-password msg+field-clear+aria wiring, lockout disables input.
last_result: green: typecheck, 99 web tests (+4), build, go build (outside sandbox; snap-confine cap_dac_override blocks go in-sandbox). ui-heuristics-reviewer: addressed the field-association finding (aria-invalid + aria-describedby → Callout id). DECLINED the 'always-mounted live region' finding — its premise (Callout inside role=group Field) is false: the Callout is a sibling of Field, FieldGroup is a plain div, and conditionally mounting a role=alert node is the canonical ARIA pattern shadcn's own FieldError uses; a nested live region would be a regression. Next in band D: Dashboard. Still deferred to band E: --info-soft collides with --primary-soft; prune next-themes dep.
notes: PURE UI/UX LOOP. The prior 57-iteration hardening track is COMPLETE and shipped as v0.6.0. This track rebuilds the web panel on shadcn/ui — see PROMPT.md + UI-RULES.md + backlog.md. The operator EXPLICITLY authorized the shadcn/Tailwind/Radix dependency tree, overriding the earlier rule-4/5 objection — do NOT re-litigate whether to adopt shadcn; it is required. Start at band A (scaffold), then B (shell), C (primitives), D (views one at a time), E (cleanup). Never touch Go/business logic — frontend only.
north_star: Every view in the indiepg panel rebuilt with shadcn/ui — clean, simple, consistent — with no hand-rolled component where a shadcn one exists, behavior identical, all tests green.
